title: Cobblemon Better Smartphone
description: New textures for Cobblemon Smartphones mod
body:
Livelier version of the Cobblemon Smartphone mod textures, a little adjust of the 2D version and 3D coloring to match with the changes.

There is also new GUI icons to be more fitting and readable in the minecraft style.

_Feel free to use or change anything at your desire, you don't need to contact me for that._
